notes: Playwright is a Node.js/TypeScript project with npm-based CI/CD
package.json has scripts: tsc, check-deps, lint-tests, eslint, build, ct
ct-react-vite component has typecheck script: tsc --noEmit
GitHub workflows in .github/workflows/: tests_components.yml runs build + ct
Current Dockerfile only has Python, no Node.js/npm installed
Added 3 new pass_to_pass tests that work in Python-only environment:
To enable full repo CI tests, Dockerfile needs: curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | bash - && apt-get install -y nodejs
